summary: Planned conservative inventory classifications for five open PRs using the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical was selected and no mutating action is recommended.

actions.reason: Standalone open contributor PR with supplied proof. Closure is not allowed because it is not duplicate, superseded, low-signal, or fixed by another hydrated candidate.
Standalone open docs/CLI fix with one failing check. It needs maintainer review or CI repair outside this close-only inventory job, not closure.
Standalone open contributor PR with proof and no hydrated duplicate or superseding candidate. It is not eligible for low-signal or duplicate closeout.
Standalone open focused bug-fix PR with supplied proof. No hydrated duplicate, superseding candidate, or low-signal basis supports closure.
Standalone open contributor PR with supplied proof. The XL diff and technical correctness require maintainer review, but there is no closure-class evidence.
